office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Clyde Shavers faces Stanwood City Councilmember Robert (Chili) Hicks.

candidates.summary: Shavers is an incumbent representative and Navy veteran with law and technology experience.
highlights: Emphasizes veterans, transportation, workforce development, reproductive rights, and environmental protection [S2].

experience.basis: He is an incumbent state representative.

candidates.summary: Hicks is a Stanwood city councilmember and Navy veteran emphasizing lower taxes and regulation, public safety, parental involvement, transportation, and small business.
highlights: Supports lower taxes, public safety, and parental involvement [S2].

safety.basis: He emphasizes public safety without a detailed enforcement mechanism.

experience.basis: He has current city council experience but no documented state legislative tenure.

social.basis: He explicitly emphasizes parental involvement in schools.
